calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eric H. Milliken, Esq., 415.341.2888, for plaintiff Diana Antonakos-Matusen.
Shannon L. Ernster, Esq., 415.352.0980, for defendant Sandford Cipinko.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFF DIANA ANTONAKOS-MATUSEN MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT is denied pursuant to CCP 473(b). Plaintiff has failed to show that the lack of notice was not caused by inexcusable neglect, and has failed to attach a copy of the proposed answer to be filed in the action. Order signed in open Court. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Continued To Dec-07-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF DIANA ANTONAKOS-MATUSEN'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is continued to December 7, 2012, on the Court's motion. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-19-2012 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Daniel W. Hager, Esq. of Roeca Haas Hager LLP, Tel. 415.352.0980, for defenant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SANFORD CIPINKO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is granted because no opposition was filed. Order and Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar May-23-2012 Text Ruling

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2012 Set For Trial On Dec-03-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2012 Continued To Apr-20-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Diana Antonakos-Matusen, appearing in her own behalf. Court ordered Defendant Ronald Anthony Dipietra dismissed without prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. Court ordered case scheduled for Case Management Conference on 4/20/2012 at 2:00 PM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
